use_when: Create --init.md workspace initialization flag workflow for a skill
excludes: General skill creation, help workflows, or config flags

use_when: Create --config.md configuration management flag workflow for a skill
excludes: General skill creation, help workflows, or init flags

use_when: Create root progressive disclosure --help.md workflow for a skill
Create targeted sub-help (*--help.md) workflows for specific sub-workflows
Create action-specific CLI entry-point flag (<action>.md) workflows for a skill
excludes: Init/config setup or progressive help workflows
